Value: Automotive After Sales Warranty Intelligence Demo Dataset
Synthetic but realistic dataset for building a LangGraph based Agentic AI warranty and service resolution platform.
EGR Valve, Turbocharger, NOx Sensor, DEF Doser, DPF, Coolant Pump and Wheel Seal after sales claims.
Load CSV files into PostgreSQL. Use claims, service_history, fault_codes and vehicle_master as structured tools. Use tsb_knowledge and warranty_rules for RAG and rule based reasoning.
This dataset is synthetic and for learning, demo, portfolio and architecture validation only. It does not contain real customer or OEM confidential data.
Claim Intake Agent → VIN History Agent → Diagnostic Agent → Knowledge Retrieval Agent → Warranty Policy Agent → Root Cause Agent → Human Review → Evidence Packet Agent.
